description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy stage containing a job named "Git MIRROR" that runs the command `git push --mirror https://$GITHUB_USERNAME:$GITHUB_PASSWORD@github.com/$GITLAB_USER_LOGIN/$CI_PROJECT_NAME.git`. The job uses the default runner image, has no caches, artifacts, services, or explicit rules, and executes on every pipeline run. Include the environment variables $GITHUB_USERNAME, $GITHUB_PASSWORD, $GITLAB_USER_LOGIN, and $CI_PROJECT_NAME for authentication and repository identification.
